mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorites (user_id, movie_id, folder_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{movieId}, #{folderId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND movie_id = #{movieId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id as userId, movie_id as movieId, folder_id as folderId, create_time as createTime FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND movie_id = #{movieId}
SELECT m.* FROM movies m JOIN favorites f ON m.movie_id = f.movie_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT m.movie_id, m.name, m.cover, m.douban_score as score, m.douban_votes as votes, m.genres, m.year, m.directors, m.actors, m.regions, m.mins, m.storyline, TO_CHAR(f.create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as favorite_time FROM movies m JOIN favorites f ON m.movie_id = f.movie_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND folder_id = #{folderId}

SELECT m.movie_id, m.name, m.cover, m.douban_score as score, m.douban_votes as votes, m.genres, m.year, m.directors, m.actors, m.regions, m.mins, m.storyline, TO_CHAR(f.create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as favorite_time FROM movies m JOIN favorites f ON m.movie_id = f.movie_id WHERE f.folder_id = #{folderId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
